item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 281200Z AUTO 25008KT 210V280 9999 BKN041/// BKN140/// ///TCU 28/17 Q1021 TEMPO 4000 -TSRA SCT060CB
🟡 TAF LFOT 281100Z 2812/2912 26005KT 9999 FEW035 PROB40 TEMPO 2812/2818 -SHRA SCT060CB PROB30 TEMPO 2812/2818 VRB10KT 4000 -TSRA BECMG 2820/2823 34010KT
